positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette with geometric mountain peaks and stylized flora (pine, stylized flowers) integrated into the composition. The background should be a solid, muted palette (e.g., cream or soft teal) to enhance printability. Use continuous, single-line drawing style with varying thickness and negative space elements. Strong emphasis on clean lines, high contrast between the foreground silhouette and the background, and a central, balanced composition. Aspect ratio designed for apparel printing, resembling a cohesive, single-panel graphic.
